summary_text: - Authoritative source for x-auto body/thumbnail status is **Notion DB (SoT)**: `docs/agents/x-auto-contract.md` explicitly says “Notion is the operational hub for `Body`, `Body JA`, `Source URLs`, `Image`, `Status`, `Tweet ID`” (line 41), and `docs/x-auto-note-linking-rule.md` repeats that for queue rows. - For the two posts, repo draft/queue artifacts in `fugue-orchestrator-public` are **not authoritative** because they carry `notion_page_id: null`: - `jq -r '.rows[] | select(.title=="AIに、臨床の魂を" or .title=="goサインの説明ができない導入は、まだ早い") | [.title,(.notion_page_id|tostring)] | @tsv' docs/drafts/20260402_x-auto_draft_manifest.json` output: `AIに、臨床の魂を null` / `goサインの説明ができない導入は、まだ早い null` - `jq -r '.[] | select(.title=="AIに、臨床の魂を" or .title=="goサインの説明ができない導入は、まだ早い") | [.title,(.notion_page_id|tostring)] | @tsv' docs/drafts/20260402_x-auto_queue_candidates.json` output: same `null` IDs. - Canonical runtime state for these two titles is in the external live queue file `/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/post_queue.json` (also confirmed by `docs/drafts/20260403_x_auto_readiness_report.md:3` `generated_from: /Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/post_queue.json`): - `jq -r '.[] | select(.title=="AIに、臨床の魂を" or .title=="goサインの説明ができない導入は、まだ早い") | [.title,.notion_page_id,.status,.source_url,.image_path,(.tweet_id//"null")] | @tsv' /Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/post_queue.json` output: `AIに、臨床の魂を 3376b8c0-f0ac-8126-99e4-f4326a076d01 draft https://note.com/nice_wren7963/n/n08c17b96b8f3 /Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/images/3376b8c0f0ac812699e4f4326a076d01.png null` `goサインの説明ができない導入は、まだ早い 3376b8c0-f0ac-8171-9ea1-e8bb62443cab draft https://x.com/cursorvers/status/2026168594162434351 /Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/images/3376b8c0f0ac81719ea1e8bb62443cab.png null` - Sync path is: repo draft files/tooling → local queue (`/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/post_queue.json`) as cache → Notion as SSOT via `scheduler.py`/`notion_sync.py` (`_pull_notion_diff_safe`, `load_posts_from_notion`, `push_updates_to_notion`, `save_posts_to_json`), with scheduler comment `Notion-first: load from Notion DB as SoT` in `scheduler.py:389`. - Thumbnail updates are **not** a pure local-file operation: `image_sync.py` uploads local image path to Supabase and patches Notion `Image` property (`NOTION Image updated`) after signing URL. - Immediate compliance risks: - `x-auto` draft queue files (`20260402_x-auto_draft_manifest.json`, `20260402_x-auto_queue_candidates.json`) can give a false sense of sync completeness because `notion_page_id` is null while live queue has IDs, so body/thumbnail edits there can diverge from SoT. - Any manual edit only to repo draft artifacts without Notion sync is non-authoritative and can be dropped/overwritten by scheduler reconciliation.
